items.name: ARES GEN-3 Exoskeleton [Torso] [Red]
items.description:
The third-generation Augmented Reflex Enhancement System (ARES) is a state-of-the-art exoskeleton frame developed by the BLKT Corporation, widely regarded as one of their flagship military assets. Standard-issue across BLKT's military forces, the exoskeleton has also surfaced repeatedly beyond official channels, rumored to have been funneled into black markets amid the ongoing corporate war.
